mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_CHAT_ROOM.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO CHAT_ROOM ( room_id, room_type, festival_id, owner_id, room_title, room_description, free_location, free_date, max_capacity, created_at ) VALUES ( #{room_id}, #{room_type}, #{festival_id}, #{owner_id}, #{room_title}, #{room_description}, #{free_location}, TO_DATE(#{free_date}, 'YYYY-MM-DD'), #{max_capacity}, SYSDATE )
mapper.select: SELECT cr.room_id, cr.room_type, cr.festival_id, cr.owner_id, cr.room_title, cr.room_description, cr.free_location, TO_CHAR(cr.free_date, 'YYYY.MM.DD') AS free_date, cr.max_capacity, cr.created_at, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS current_count FROM chat_room cr LEFT JOIN member m ON cr.owner_id = m.member_id WHERE cr.room_type = 'GROUP' ORDER BY cr.room_id DESC

choose.otherwise:
SELECT #{roomId} AS room_id, 'FESTIVAL' AS room_type, fi.content_id AS festival_id, NULL AS owner_id, fi.title || ' 공식 모임' AS room_title,
NVL(fi.overview, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다. 함께 갈 메이트를 구해보세요!') AS room_description,
fi.addr1 AS free_location, fi.event_start_date || ' ~ ' || fi.event_end_date AS free_date, 500 AS max_capacity, SYSDATE AS created_at, NULL AS nickname, fi.first_image AS profile_image_url, 0 AS current_count FROM festival_info fi WHERE fi.content_id = ABS(#{roomId})

mapper.select: SELECT m.member_id, m.nickname, m.profile_image_url FROM chat_room_user cru JOIN member m ON cru.member_id = m.member_id JOIN chat_room cr ON cru.room_id = cr.room_id WHERE cru.room_id = #{room_id} AND (cr.owner_id IS NULL OR cru.member_id != cr.owner_id)
SELECT max_capacity AS "MAX_CAPACITY", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = #{room_id}) AS "CURRENT_COUNT" FROM chat_room WHERE room_id = #{room_id}
mapper.delete: DELETE FROM CHAT_ROOM_USER WHERE room_id = #{room_id} AND member_id = #{member_id}
mapper.select:
SELECT NVL(cr.room_id, -fi.content_id) AS "ROOM_ID", NVL(cr.room_type, 'FESTIVAL') AS "ROOM_TYPE", fi.content_id AS "FESTIVAL_ID", cr.owner_id AS "OWNER_ID", NVL(cr.room_title, fi.title || ' 공식 모임') AS "ROOM_TITLE", NVL(cr.room_description, fi.title || ' 공식 모임방입니다.') AS "ROOM_DESCRIPTION", NVL(cr.free_location, fi.addr1) AS "FREE_LOCATION", fi.event_start_date || ' ~ ' || fi.event_end_date AS "FREE_DATE", NVL(cr.max_capacity, 500) AS "MAX_CAPACITY", cr.created_at AS "CREATED_AT", (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user cru WHERE cru.room_id = cr.room_id) AS "CURRENT_COUNT", fi.first_image AS "FIRST_IMAGE",
(SELECT COUNT(*) FROM chat_room_user WHERE room_id = cr.room_id AND member_id = #{memberId})
0 AS "IS_JOINED_INT" FROM festival_info fi LEFT JOIN chat_room cr ON fi.content_id = cr.festival_id AND cr.room_type = 'FESTIVAL' ORDER BY fi.event_start_date DESC
